discover.eyebrow: Want to get to know us?
discover.title: Who we are
discover.desc: The mission, people and projects that genuinely change student life.

about.heading: An organisation that has been working for over 40 years
about.p1: The Student Government of Wrocław University of Economics and Business is an organisation that for over 40 years has represented students’ interests before the university authorities, the city and national institutions. We run projects, organise events and make sure the student voice is heard.
about.p2: We bring together people who care. Anyone of you can join our team and help shape the UEW academic community.
about.quote: We don’t wait for change. We create it.

adaptacja.description: A welcome programme for first-years. We help you find your feet at the university from day one.

juwenalia.name: Economic Juwenalia
juwenalia.description: The biggest UEW student festival. Three days of music, sport and fun.

tarcza.name: Student Shield
tarcza.description: Free legal help for students. We advise on regulatory matters and beyond.

p1.heading: We build a student community
p1.lead: University is the people you meet.
p1.body: From Adapciak and Adaptation Days to the UEW Ball, TEDxUEW and UE Party — all year round we create events that bring students together, help them grow and stay in memory for years.

p2.heading: We’re on your side
p2.lead: When you need help, we’re right here.
p2.body: Student rights, scholarships, psychological support, the Student Ombudsman — in the Student zone we’ve gathered everything you need in your everyday life at the university.
